Since I have 0 to trade and the alternative to accepting is rejection (which results in 0 dollars and ends the game), +1 is the maximum possible utility I can extract in this specific turn. This signals that they are willing to accept *any* positive outcome for me to avoid mutual destruction. Proposing a counter-offer (which would require them to give me more or me to give them something I don't have) would likely be rejected, leading to the total loss they warned about. Accepting is the only high-probability move. Status: OK.
